title: A Forger in the Marais
tagline: A most dark business touching Émile Sauval, wherein every paper protesteth innocence and every silence groaneth guilt.
briefing: Here is laid before thee the matter of Émile Sauval, a cause as knotted as old rope in rain. 5 persons stand within the compass of suspicion; some lie outright, some tell truth in such a fashion that truth itself seemeth crooked. Read not only the open leaves, but pursue the sealed packets also, for the naked marrow of the case hath been thrust behind wax and twine, and no charitable clerk hath marked the way.
